fn get_first_and_last(input: &str) -> (&str, &str) {
    let first = input.split(',').next().unwrap();
    let last = input.split(',').next_back().unwrap();
    (first, last)
}

fn extract_filename(path: &str) -> &str {
    path.split('/').next_back().unwrap()
}

fn get_domain(email: &str) -> &str {
    email.split('@').next_back().unwrap()
}
